pipeline_mode.reason: HIGH complexity (4.0/5) — requires research, brainstorm, spec, TDD, plan, execute, verify phases

enabled.reason: All phases needed upfront — test strategy design cannot be deferred
Tier A disqualified: scope > 3 files, ambiguity >= 3, architectural decisions required

research_agents.reason: Two research agents: one for pipeline contract analysis, one for coverage gap identification

execution_agents.reason: Three execution agents: one per pipeline focus (bugfix tests, feature tests, cross-pipeline tests)

verification_agents.reason: Two adversarial verifiers: mutation tester + contract compliance auditor

research.reason: File reading and cross-referencing — sonnet sufficient

brainstorm.reason: Strategic test design requires opus-level reasoning

spec.reason: Formal specification with EARS requirements — opus for precision

tdd.reason: Bash test code generation — sonnet sufficient

plan.reason: Dependency graph and parallelization decisions — opus for quality

execute.reason: Bash script implementation — sonnet sufficient, execution agents scaled to 3

verify.reason: Adversarial verification requires opus-level reasoning for mutation testing

review_rounds.reason: Two rounds: post-implementation review + post-verification fixes

correctness.reason: Tests must actually validate the contracts they claim to validate

completeness.reason: Coverage of all 3 pipelines and identified gaps is critical

consistency.reason: Tests must follow existing conventions and use consistent patterns

maintainability.reason: Tests must survive legitimate refactoring without false positives

performance.reason: Full suite must complete in <30 seconds — low weight because tests are pure grep/awk
